category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Ghana GSA conformity assessment and Energy Commission energy-label/MEPS requirements.

title.en: China-to-Ghana Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入加纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入迦納：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Ghana's GSA mandatory conformity assessment (G-Mark / destination inspection), GS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standards, and the Energy Commission's mandatory refrigerator energy-label and MEPS regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与加纳标准局（GSA）强制合格评定（G-Mark/到岸检验）、GS/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准及能源委员会强制冰箱能效标签与最低能效标准（MEPS）制度的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與迦納標準局（GSA）強制合格評定（G-Mark/到岸檢驗）、GS/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準及能源委員會強制冰箱能效標籤與最低能效標準（MEPS）制度的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ghanaian legislation, GSA conformity-assessment procedures, Energy Commission MEPS thresholds and labelling rules, and applicable GS/IEC standards with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行加纳法律、GSA合格评定程序、能源委员会最低能效标准门槛与标签规则及适用的GS/IEC标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行迦納法律、GSA合格評定程序、能源委員會最低能效標準門檻與標籤規則及適用的GS/IEC標準。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Ghana compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety conformity to GS/IEC 60335-2-24 under GSA's mandatory conformity assessment — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not directly accepted, and a GSA Certificate of Conformity / destination inspection is required at Tema or Takoradi; (2) a notably strict Energy Commission MEPS and mandatory star-rating energy label for refrigerators — units below the minimum efficiency level are prohibited from import, and EEI must be recalculated to the Ghanaian/IEC test method rather than the China GB 12021.2 metric; (3) a registered in-country importer must be the regulatory counterparty for clearance and labelling; and (4) NCA type-approval applies only if the unit contains a radio module (e.g. Wi-Fi smart fridges). R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge documentation against IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified. Ghana has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大加纳合规差距：（1）依据GSA强制合格评定按GS/IEC 60335-2-24进行电气安全合规——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被直接接受，须取得GSA合格证书并在特马（Tema）或塔科拉迪（Takoradi）接受到岸检验；（2）能源委员会对冰箱设有以严格著称的最低能效标准（MEPS）及强制星级能效标签——低于最低能效水平的产品禁止进口，且能效须按加纳/IEC测试方法而非中国GB 12021.2指标重新计算；（3）须由在加纳注册的进口商作为清关与标签的监管对接方；（4）NCA型号核准仅在产品含无线模块（如Wi-Fi智能冰箱）时适用。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。加纳没有欧盟式的横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声法规。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大迦納合規差距：（1）依據GSA強制合格評定按GS/IEC 60335-2-24進行電氣安全合規——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被直接接受，須取得GSA合格證書並在特馬（Tema）或塔科拉迪（Takoradi）接受到岸檢驗；（2）能源委員會對冰箱設有以嚴格著稱的最低能效標準（MEPS）及強制星級能效標籤——低於最低能效水平的產品禁止進口，且能效須按迦納/IEC測試方法而非中國GB 12021.2指標重新計算；（3）須由在迦納註冊的進口商作為清關與標籤的監管對接方；（4）NCA型號核准僅在產品含無線模組（如Wi-Fi智能冰箱）時適用。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。迦納沒有歐盟式的橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲法規。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (GSA, Ghana Energy Commission, GRA Customs, NCA). Local PDFs not accepted as canonical.
